title: Park Avenue is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Park Avenue is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, Park Avenue in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Park Avenue:
Park Avenue is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Park Avenue!
